title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 47.120 - Report of county seat commissioners to circuit court — proceedings thereon
text:
47.120.  Report of county seat commissioners to circuit court — proceedings thereon. — The commissioners shall make report of their proceedings, accompanied by the deed, abstract and evidence of title to said land, to the circuit court, at the next term thereof; if the judge approve the same, he shall certify the decision of the court therein to the county commission; and if said court shall believe that the commissioners have selected the most suitable place for the erection of the public buildings, then the place so selected shall be the permanent seat of justice of the county, and the title to the land conveyed for that purpose shall be vested in the county.
(RSMo 1939 § 13741) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12082; 1919 § 9482; 1909 § 3703
